args: set -euo pipefail; python -m pip install -q google-cloud-storage; mkdir -p /workspace/scpn/out; python -c "from google.cloud import storage; c=storage.Client(); b=c.bucket('gotm-sc-neurocore'); b.blob('scpn-quantum-control/rust-vqe-methods/benchmark_gpu_methods.py').download_to_filename('/workspace/scpn/benchmark_gpu_methods.py')"; python /workspace/scpn/benchmark_gpu_methods.py --label vertex_t4 --sizes 8 10 11 --batch-size 64 --repeats 20 --output-dir /workspace/scpn/out; python -c "from google.cloud import storage; c=storage.Client(); b=c.bucket('gotm-sc-neurocore'); [b.blob('scpn-quantum-control/rust-vqe-methods/' + name).upload_from_filename('/workspace/scpn/out/' + name) for name in ['gpu_benchmark_summary_vertex_t4_2026-05-05.json', 'gpu_benchmark_summary_vertex_t4_2026-05-05.csv']]"
